basic_details.job_title: BOBCAPS Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: BOB Capital Markets Ltd. (BOBCAPS) – A subsidiary of Bank of Baroda
basic_details.short_information: BOB Capital Markets Ltd. (BOBCAPS), a subsidiary of Bank of Baroda, has released an opening for the role of Business Development Manager (Off Roll) on a full-time, on-site basis. The selected candidate will be responsible for promoting and facilitating the opening of Demat & Trading (2-in-1) accounts, new client acquisition, maintaining client and bank relationships, and meeting sales targets.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

application_fee.all_categories_fee: NIL – No application fee mentioned in the notification

age_limit.details: Category Age Limit All Categories Not specified in the notification

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil all eligibility conditions before applying. Only candidates with the requisite experience as specified should apply. | Business Development Manager (Off Roll) | Criteria Details Essential Educational Qualification Minimum Graduation OR 12th Pass from a recognised Board/University. Essential Work Experience Minimum 6 months of experience in the Capital Market sector, with preference for experience in opening of Demat & Trading accounts and selling broking products. Key Skills Required Sales & Marketing skills; Customer Relationship Management (CRM) skills; Excellent communication skills. Role Responsibilities Promoting and opening of Demat & Trading (2-in-1) accounts; New Client Acquisition; maintaining Client and Bank relationships; meeting sales targets.

vacancy_details.Details: Minimum Graduation OR 12th Pass from a recognised Board/University.

Promoting and opening of Demat & Trading (2-in-1) accounts; New Client Acquisition; maintaining Client and Bank relationships; meeting sales targets.

salary_details.business development manager (off roll): Not specified in the notification. Candidates may seek details at the time of interview.
salary_details.nature of employment: Full-time, On-site, Off Roll (not on the regular payroll of BOBCAPS)

selection_process: Applications received via email at [email protected] will be screened based on the candidate's educational qualification
relevant experience in the Capital Market sector
and experience in Demat & Trading account opening and broking product sales. Only candidates with the requisite experience as specified in the notification will be considered.
Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview/interaction. The date
and mode of interview will be communicated to shortlisted candidates separately.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply through email only. Applications submitted through any other mode will not be accepted. Only candidates with the requisite experience as mentioned in the notification should apply.
Prepare an updated resume/CV highlighting educational qualifications, Capital Market experience, experience in Demat & Trading account opening, broking product sales experience, and key skills.
Mention "Application for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll)" in the subject line of the email. Applications with any other subject line will not be accepted.
Attach the resume/CV and any relevant supporting documents.
Send the email at the earliest as no specific last date has been mentioned.
Apply via Email at: [email protected] Subject Line (Mandatory): "Application for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll)"
important_instructions: This is an Off Roll, full-time, on-site position. Selected candidates will not be on the regular payroll of BOB Capital Markets Ltd. Only candidates with minimum 6 months of experience in the Capital Market sector should apply. Candidates without the requisite experience need not apply. Applications must be submitted via email at [email protected] only. Applications through any other mode will not be accepted. The subject line of the email must read exactly: "Application for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll)". Applications with any other subject line will not be accepted. Candidates with experience in opening Demat & Trading accounts and selling broking products will be given preference during shortlisting. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further stages of the selection process. No separate communication will be sent to non-shortlisted candidates. Candidates are advised to apply at the earliest as no specific last date has been mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: BOB Capital Markets Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026 – Selection Process
content_sections.text: Stage 1 – Application Screening Applications received via email at [email protected] will be screened based on the candidate's educational qualification, relevant experience in the Capital Market sector, and experience in Demat & Trading account opening and broking product sales. Only candidates with the requisite experience as specified in the notification will be considered. Stage 2 – Interview / Interaction Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview/interaction. The date, time, and mode of interview will be communicated to shortlisted candidates separately.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BOB Capital Markets Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply through email only. Applications submitted through any other mode will not be accepted. Only candidates with the requisite experience as mentioned in the notification should apply. Steps to Apply: Prepare an updated resume/CV highlighting educational qualifications, Capital Market experience, experience in Demat & Trading account opening, broking product sales experience, and key skills. Compose an email to [email protected] . Mention "Application for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll)" in the subject line of the email. Applications with any other subject line will not be accepted. Attach the resume/CV and any relevant supporting documents. Send the email at the earliest as no specific last date has been mentioned. Apply via Email at: [email protected] Subject Line (Mandatory): "Application for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll)"

content_sections.heading: BOB Capital Markets Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026 – Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is an Off Roll, full-time, on-site position. Selected candidates will not be on the regular payroll of BOB Capital Markets Ltd. Only candidates with minimum 6 months of experience in the Capital Market sector should apply. Candidates without the requisite experience need not apply. Applications must be submitted via email at [email protected] only. Applications through any other mode will not be accepted. The subject line of the email must read exactly: "Application for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll)" . Applications with any other subject line will not be accepted. Candidates with experience in opening Demat & Trading accounts and selling broking products will be given preference during shortlisting. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further stages of the selection process. No separate communication will be sent to non-shortlisted candidates. Candidates are advised to apply at the earliest as no specific last date has been mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post announced under BOB Capital Markets Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BOB Capital Markets Ltd. (BOBCAPS) has invited applications for the post of Business Development Manager (Off Roll). The role involves client acquisition, Demat & Trading account opening, relationship management, and sales target achievement.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for BOBCAPS Business Development Manager 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Graduation or 12th Class from a recognized board or university. Applicants should also meet the required experience criteria mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. Is work experience mandatory for BOBCAPS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must possess at least 6 months of experience in the Capital Market sector, preferably in Demat & Trading account opening and broking product sales.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for BOB Capital Markets Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted only through email. Interested candidates must send their updated resume to [email protected] with the prescribed subject line.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for BOBCAPS Business Development Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification, the last date for application submission is 31 January 2027. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BOBCAPS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The notification does not mention any application fee. Eligible candidates can apply free of cost through the specified email process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BOBCAPS Business Development Manager 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of application screening based on qualifications and experience, followed by an interview or interaction for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key responsibilities of a Business Development Manager at BOBCAPS?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be responsible for opening Demat & Trading accounts, acquiring new clients, maintaining customer relationships, coordinating with banks, and achieving sales targets.
